lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਭਸਮ ਰੁਲਾਇ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਕਹ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dehee bhasam rulaae na jaapee keh geaa |
lines.english: When the body rolls in the dust, it is not known where the soul has gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape thaap uthaap sabad nivaajiaa |5|
lines.english: You Yourself establish and disestablish; through the Word of Your Shabad, You elevate and exalt. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਨਾਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੂਰਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਭ ਤੂ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: toon naahee prabh door jaaneh sabh too hai |
lines.english: You are not far away, God; You know everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਖਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਭੀ ਤੂ ਹੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh vekh hadoor antar bhee too hai |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh sees You ever-present; You are deep within the nucleus of our inner self. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ਸੋ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਭਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aape rahiaa samaae so visamaad bheaa |6|
lines.english: He Himself is permeating and pervading; this is wonderful and amazing! ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mai deejai naam nivaas antar saant hoe |
lines.english: Please, bless me with a home in Your Name; may my inner self be at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਇ ॥੮॥੩॥੫॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai naanak daas satigur mat dee |8|3|5|
lines.english: May slave Nanak sing Your Glorious Praises; O True Guru, please share the Teachings with me. ||8||3||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 3 ghar 1 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Third Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਚਾਖੇ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad mahaa ras meetthaa bin chaakhe saad na jaapai |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is the sweetest and most sublime essence, but without tasting it, its flavor cannot be experienced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: naamai hee te sabh kichh hoaa bin satigur naam na jaapai |
lines.english: Everything comes from the Naam, the Name of the Lord; without the True Guru, the Naam is not experienced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲੈ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਚੀਨਸਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: kauddee badalai janam gavaaeaa cheenas naahee aapai |
lines.english: He wastes this human life in exchange for a mere shell; he does not understand his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai taa eko jaanai haumai dukh na santaapai |1|
lines.english: But, if he becomes Gurmukh, then he comes to know the One Lord, and the disease of egotism does not afflict him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਅਪਣੇ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur apane vittahu jin saache siau liv laaee |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru, who has lovingly attached me to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਚੀਨੑਿ ਆਤਮੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad cheena aatam paragaasiaa sahaje rahiaa samaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Concentrating on the Word of the Shabad, the soul is illumined and enlightened. I remain absorbed in celestial ecstasy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh gaavai guramukh boojhai guramukh sabad beechaare |
lines.english: The Gurmukh sings the Praises of the Lord; the Gurmukh understands. The Gurmukh contemplates the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧਾ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਟੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhaa andh kamaavai bikh khatte sansaare |
lines.english: The blind self-willed manmukh acts blindly, and earns only poison in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh gur te upajai guramukh kaaraj savaare |
lines.english: Body and soul are totally rejuvenated through the Guru; the Gurmukh's affairs are resolved in his favor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਚਾਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: soee sevak je satigur seve chaalai satigur bhaae |
lines.english: He alone is a selfless servant, who serves the True Guru, and walks in harmony with the True Guru's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi sadaa dukh paae bin gur at piaare |2|
lines.english: Enticed by Maya, he suffers in constant pain, without the most Beloved Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਹੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa sabad sifat hai saachee saachaa man vasaae |
lines.english: The True Shabad, the Word of God, is the True Praise of God; enshrine the True Lord within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਖੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee guramukh aakhai haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh speaks the True Word of Gurbani, and egotism departs from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਘਾਲੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖਟੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh ghaale guramukh khatte guramukh naam japaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh works, and the Gurmukh earns; the Gurmukh inspires others to chant the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape daataa karam hai saachaa saachaa sabad sunaae |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver, and True are His actions. He proclaims the True Word of the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਕੂੜੋ ਬੋਲੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਬੀਜੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sad hee koorro bolai bikh beejai bikh khaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh always tells lies; he plants the seeds of poison, and eats only poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa alipat saachai rang raataa gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: He is forever unattached, imbued with the Love of the True Lord, intuitively in harmony with the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵਣੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa teerath jit sat sar naavan guramukh aap bujhaae |
lines.english: True is that place of pilgrimage, where one bathes in the pool of Truth, and achieves self-realization as Gurmukh. The Gurmukh understands his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ਬਾਧਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਦਾਧਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਵਣੁ ਛਡਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jamakaal baadhaa trisanaa daadhaa bin gur kavan chhaddaae |4|
lines.english: He is bound and gagged by the Messenger of Death, and burnt in the fire of desire; who can save him, except the Guru? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਦਿਖਾਏ ਤਿਤੁ ਨਾਤੈ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath gur sabad dikhaae tith naatai mal jaae |
lines.english: The Lord has shown that the Word of the Guru's Shabad is the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage; bathing in it, filth is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਚਾ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾ ਮਲੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad sachaa hai niramal naa mal lagai na laae |
lines.english: True and Immaculate is the True Word of His Shabad; no filth touches or clings to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਸਾਲਾਹ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sachee sifat sachee saalaah poore gur te paae |5|
lines.english: True Praise, True Devotional Praise, is obtained from the Perfect Guru. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੇਰਾ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man sabh kichh har tis keraa duramat kehan na jaae |
lines.english: Body, mind, everything belongs to the Lord; but the evil-minded ones cannot even say this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hukam hovai taa niramal hovai haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: If such is the Hukam of the Lord's Command, then one becomes pure and spotless, and the ego is taken away from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਖੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਚਾਖੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee saakhee sahaje chaakhee trisanaa agan bujhaae |
lines.english: I have intuitively tasted the Guru's Teachings, and the fire of my desire has been quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਾਤਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad raataa sahaje maataa sahaje rahiaa samaae |6|
lines.english: Attuned to the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one is naturally intoxicated, merging imperceptibly into the Lord. ||6||
